title: Storm&Lighthouse 6x Bouncing Putty Party Bag Fillers for Kids Colourful Slime Tubs Perfect as Fidget and Sensory Toys
features: Pack of 6 bouncing putty, each in their own tub. 15g of each colour.
Comes in 6 bright colours: orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink.
Safe and non-toxic, this bouncing putty for kids will create hours of fun as children play, stretch, mix and bounce the putty.
Not just for kids, this slime is great for adults too! Use as a fidget slime, sensory play, or just for some putty fun!
Not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description This bouncing mini slime is great in party bags for kids party, stocking fillers, or for bringing out on a rainy day! In 6 bold colours, this putty will keep kids and grown-ups busy for hours. Simply roll up your colour of choice into a ball and watch it bounce! Stretch, twist and mould it into any shapes. Mix the colours to see what designs you can make for your very own stress balls. Great as pass the parcel prizes, party bag fillers, stocking fillers, or lucky dip prizes, the choices are endless! Use as autism aids or for those with sensory issues, a great little way to keep hands and minds busy. Each coloured slime comes in its own tub, so it can be put away to play with again. Suitable for ages 3 and over. Directions 1. Remove the desired coloured putty from its tub. 2. Roll the putty into a ball and watch it bounce. 3. Stretch, twist, and mould the putty into different shapes. 4. Mix different colours to create unique designs. 5. Use as a fidget toy, stress reliever, or sensory play item.
